documents.description: Clarifications on digital lending guidelines - HTML page

documents.description: Master direction on KYC norms for banks and financial institutions, updated through 2025

documents.description: Comprehensive FAQ on KYC master direction covering Aadhaar, V-CIP, CKYCR, and periodic updation

documents.description: Amendment introducing Video-based Customer Identification Process (V-CIP) for digital KYC

documents.description: Enhanced V-CIP guidelines with detailed infrastructure requirements and periodic KYC updation norms

documents.title: Master Direction on KYC - Full Text (HTML)

documents.title: Master Direction on Prepaid Payment Instruments (PPIs)

documents.title: Guidelines on Regulation of Payment Aggregators and Payment Gateways
documents.description: Regulations for payment aggregators and gateways including authorization requirements

_metadata.notes: URLs use RBI commonman portal and third-party mirrors to avoid rbidocs.rbi.org.in bot protection (HTTP 418). HTML pages are scraped and converted to text during parsing. For any URLs that fail, download manually in browser and place in data/raw/<regulator>/ folder.
_metadata.manual_download_instructions: If automated download fails: 1) Open the URL in your browser, 2) Save/download the PDF, 3) Rename to <document-id>.pdf, 4) Place in data/raw/rbi/ or data/raw/sebi/
